# AERIS-10 Radar Dashboard — CI / reproducible-install lockfile.
#
# Generated by installing requirements_dashboard.txt + pyftdi into a clean
# Python 3.10+ venv and running `pip freeze`. Regenerate whenever you bump
# a version in requirements_dashboard.txt:
#
#     python3 -m venv /tmp/plfm_lockenv
#     source /tmp/plfm_lockenv/bin/activate
#     pip install -r 9_Firmware/9_3_GUI/requirements_dashboard.txt pyftdi
#     pip freeze | grep -v -E '^(pip|setuptools|wheel)==' | sort \
#         > 9_Firmware/9_3_GUI/requirements-lock.txt
#
# Used by .github/workflows/ci.yml (python-tests job) so CI sees the same
# numpy/matplotlib/h5py byte-for-byte.
contourpy==1.3.3
cycler==0.12.1
fonttools==4.62.1
h5py==3.16.0
kiwisolver==1.5.0
matplotlib==3.10.8
numpy==2.4.4
packaging==26.1
pillow==12.2.0
pyftdi==0.57.1
pyparsing==3.3.2
pyserial==3.5
python-dateutil==2.9.0.post0
pyusb==1.3.1
six==1.17.0
